methodsAttempted.query: site:uniandes.edu.co "Lineamientos para el uso de inteligencia artificial generativa" "Universidad de los Andes"
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found the official PDF link through Uniandes and Revistas Uniandes pages.
Direct official PDF fetch succeeded and produced extractable Spanish text for claim evidence.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery identified the institutional Uniandes IAG guidelines PDF as the canonical evidence source. News and DIDACTA pages were useful discovery context; the Revistas Uniandes page was rejected for broad university claims because it is journal/editorial-process specific.

artifacts.claimText: Universidad de los Andes has an October 2024 institutional generative AI guidance document for students, professors, researchers, creators, and administrative employees.

artifacts.claimText: The Uniandes guidance recommends informed, responsible, critical, transparent use of generative AI and says users should not present AI-generated material as their own.

citation.citationTitle: Lineamientos para el uso de inteligencia artificial generativa (IAG) en la Universidad de los Andes

artifacts.sourceTitle: Lineamientos para el uso de inteligencia artificial generativa (IAG) en la Universidad de los Andes
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: los usuarios deben evaluar críticamente los materiales generados por las herramientas... Usar de manera transparente la herramienta para elaborar trabajos académicos, investigativos o para reportes administrativos... No se debe hacer pasar como propio un texto u otro material que haya sido generado con una herramienta de IAG.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Users should critically evaluate AI-generated material, use tools transparently in academic/research/administrative work, and not pass AI-generated material off as their own.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.title: Universidad de los Andes generative AI guidance staged crawl
artifacts.summary: Staged crawl found an official October 2024 Uniandes generative AI guidelines PDF. Claims are limited to institutional orientation, responsible and transparent use, privacy cautions, instructor-authorized student use, professor communication duties, and research integrity boundaries.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Journal-specific Revistas Uniandes AI guidelines were rejected for broad university-level claims and would require a scoped editorial-process record.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
